templates.name: revenue_by_product
templates.description: Get total revenue for a specific product over a time period
templates.sql_template: SELECT p.product_name, SUM(s.quantity * p.price) as total_revenue, SUM(s.quantity) as total_units FROM sales s JOIN products p ON s.product_id = p.product_id WHERE p.product_name LIKE :product_name AND s.sale_date BETWEEN :start_date AND :end_date GROUP BY p.product_name
example_queries: What was iPhone revenue last quarter?
Show me iPad sales for 2024
How much revenue did Mac generate this year?

templates.name: revenue_by_country
templates.description: Get revenue breakdown by country for a time period
templates.sql_template: SELECT st.country, SUM(s.quantity * p.price) as total_revenue, SUM(s.quantity) as total_units FROM sales s JOIN products p ON s.product_id = p.product_id JOIN stores st ON s.store_id = st.store_id WHERE s.sale_date BETWEEN :start_date AND :end_date GROUP BY st.country ORDER BY total_revenue DESC
example_queries: Show revenue by country last quarter
Which country had the highest sales this year?
Break down revenue by region

templates.name: product_revenue_by_country
templates.description: Get revenue for a specific product in a specific country
templates.sql_template: SELECT p.product_name, st.country, SUM(s.quantity * p.price) as total_revenue, SUM(s.quantity) as total_units FROM sales s JOIN products p ON s.product_id = p.product_id JOIN stores st ON s.store_id = st.store_id WHERE p.product_name LIKE :product_name AND st.country = :country AND s.sale_date BETWEEN :start_date AND :end_date GROUP BY p.product_name, st.country
example_queries: What was iPhone revenue in India last quarter?
Show me iPad sales in UK this year
How much did Mac generate in USA?

templates.name: top_products_by_revenue
templates.description: Get top N products by revenue for a time period
templates.sql_template: SELECT p.product_name, c.category_name, SUM(s.quantity * p.price) as total_revenue, SUM(s.quantity) as total_units FROM sales s JOIN products p ON s.product_id = p.product_id JOIN categories c ON p.category_id = c.category_id WHERE s.sale_date BETWEEN :start_date AND :end_date GROUP BY p.product_name, c.category_name ORDER BY total_revenue DESC LIMIT 10
example_queries: What are the top products by revenue?
Show me best selling products last quarter
Which products generated the most revenue?

templates.name: revenue_by_category
templates.description: Get revenue breakdown by product category
templates.sql_template: SELECT c.category_name, SUM(s.quantity * p.price) as total_revenue, SUM(s.quantity) as total_units FROM sales s JOIN products p ON s.product_id = p.product_id JOIN categories c ON p.category_id = c.category_id WHERE s.sale_date BETWEEN :start_date AND :end_date GROUP BY c.category_name ORDER BY total_revenue DESC
example_queries: Show revenue by category
Which product category sells the most?
Compare iPhone vs Mac sales

templates.name: top_stores_by_revenue
templates.description: Get top performing stores by revenue
templates.sql_template: SELECT st.store_name, st.city, st.country, SUM(s.quantity * p.price) as total_revenue, SUM(s.quantity) as total_units FROM sales s JOIN products p ON s.product_id = p.product_id JOIN stores st ON s.store_id = st.store_id WHERE s.sale_date BETWEEN :start_date AND :end_date GROUP BY st.store_name, st.city, st.country ORDER BY total_revenue DESC LIMIT 10
example_queries: Which stores have the highest revenue?
Show me top performing stores
What are the best stores by sales?

templates.name: warranty_claim_analysis
templates.description: Analyze warranty claims by product and status
templates.sql_template: SELECT p.product_name, w.repair_status, COUNT(w.claim_id) as claim_count FROM warranty w JOIN sales s ON w.sale_id = s.sale_id JOIN products p ON s.product_id = p.product_id WHERE w.claim_date BETWEEN :start_date AND :end_date GROUP BY p.product_name, w.repair_status ORDER BY claim_count DESC
example_queries: Show warranty claims by product
How many warranty claims do we have?
What's the warranty claim rate?

templates.name: city_performance
templates.sql_template: SELECT st.city, st.country, COUNT(DISTINCT s.sale_id) as total_sales, SUM(s.quantity * p.price) as total_revenue FROM sales s JOIN products p ON s.product_id = p.product_id JOIN stores st ON s.store_id = st.store_id WHERE s.sale_date BETWEEN :start_date AND :end_date GROUP BY st.city, st.country ORDER BY total_revenue DESC
example_queries: Which cities have the best sales?
Compare performance across cities
Show revenue by city

templates.name: product_launches
templates.description: Analyze sales performance of recently launched products
templates.sql_template: SELECT p.product_name, p.launch_date, COUNT(s.sale_id) as total_sales, SUM(s.quantity) as units_sold, SUM(s.quantity * p.price) as total_revenue FROM products p LEFT JOIN sales s ON p.product_id = s.product_id AND s.sale_date >= p.launch_date WHERE p.launch_date >= :since_date GROUP BY p.product_name, p.launch_date ORDER BY p.launch_date DESC
example_queries: How are new products performing?
Show sales for recently launched products
What's the performance of products launched this year?
